name: sheet
title: Sheet
description: v2-look Sheet: styled handle (open/closed opacity), dimmed overlay, rounded background, padded container and scroll view, plus the controlled composition, over the unstyled @tamagui/ui Sheet behavior.

native: requires a Portal provider at the app root for the sheet to mount above content
react-native-safe-area-context is used for safe-area insets on native (optional peer)
